channel.title: Space Quotes — Tidbits
channel.description: Sourced tidbits from real FCC, ITU and FAA space filings, paired with space quotes.

item.title: AST SpaceMobile just told the FCC exactly how its giant satellites will fall out of the sky
item.description: On February 20, 2026, AST & Science, LLC (AST SpaceMobile) filed a supplement in FCC docket 25-201 detailing how it will dispose of its satellites at end of …

item.title: Amazon wants the FCC to rewrite satellite-spectrum rules set when Ka-band was 'in its infancy'
item.description: On January 29, 2026, Kuiper Systems LLC — the Amazon satellite venture now permanently branded Amazon Leo — filed a letter in FCC docket 25-157, the Moderniz…

item.title: Rural carriers tell the FCC: don't let satellites beam over our spectrum without permission
item.description: On November 18, 2025, the Competitive Carriers Association (CCA) filed an opposition in FCC docket 25-201 against the applications of AST & Science, AT&T, Ve…
